_meta.note: Machine-seeded Wave 13-14. Real translated strings in native script. Human review required before ratification.

speakFriend.title: Linga sô-kôlî, kûê lo.
speakFriend.description: Liana Banyan balë-ngango yâ bïla sêse. Ngbangâ yângâ mû sêse ayeke nzû ti nzûna.
speakFriend.provisionalNotice: Lïngö ti sêse na azo na Marks sîgî. Marks takwë ti fa nzö, ngangö ê nzûna.
speakFriend.bountyDescription: Mbï-tëne Liana Banyan ti {{language}}. Sö {{marks}} Marks.
speakFriend.scopeNavigation: Alakö ti ngû na kîrî ti pekë
speakFriend.speakFounderTitle: Kôlî ti Mbo-tere: Pekë Sô Môdî
speakFriend.speakFounderDesc: Sô-kôlî nzö tûndûa yê na ndô. Sô 26 na ndö mbo.
speakFriend.step1Body: Lângö Nzûna ti Mbï-tëne sô Help Wanted.
speakFriend.step2Body: Mbï-tëne sô-kôlî yângo. Kûê ti Bounty Poster.
speakFriend.step3Body: Bïla nzö, sö Marks na IP Ledger.
speakFriend.subtitle: "Kwe zo, a sara."

languageSwitcher.tip: Sëse ni fata sô Durin nzö takwë!
